{{ tr "simple" }}
{{ trs "plural" 3 }}
{{ trf "formatted" "Name" "John" "Age" 20 }}
{{ trsf "formattedPlural" 5 "Name" "John" }}
{{ trc "action" "save" }}
{{ trcs "action" "savePlural" 5 }}
{{ trcf "action" "saveFile" "File" "my-file.txt" }}
{{ trcsf "action" "saveFiles" 5 "Directory" "my-files" }}
